name: 갑수
visual_description: An elderly Korean man in his 70s. He wears a worn undershirt covered by a neatly ironed old delivery uniform vest. His face is etched with deep wrinkles, reflecting a life of hardship and grief. His eyes are filled with sorrow, and his hair is likely thin and graying. He appears frail but meticulously neat in his attire.
consistency_prompt: Elderly Korean man in delivery uniform vest, sorrowful expression, wrinkled face.
